# Chore Template

## Non-Product Work

State why this is maintenance, tooling, documentation, state repair, evidence refresh, cleanup, or workflow improvement work rather than a feature slice.

## Origin

Record the source that created the chore, such as a retrospective, review outcome, smell trigger, incident, or operator observation.

## Scope

List the bounded non-product work included in this chore.

## Acceptance Criteria

Record verifiable criteria that prove the chore is complete.

## Verification Plan

Describe tests, commands, review, or manual evidence needed to verify completion.

## Expected Files

List expected code, documentation, state, and evidence files.

## Required Evidence

List evidence artifacts required before the chore can close.

## Operator Input Status

State whether policy, business tradeoff, cost/risk override, or ambiguous scope input is required.
